0.content:
# 📣 Marketing — UTM Campaign & Referrer Attribution Dashboard

**Application:** [APP_NAME] (`APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX`) | **Data Source:** Gen 3 RUM (`user.events`, `user.sessions`)

**Purpose:** Track marketing campaign effectiveness by analysing UTM-tagged traffic, referrer sources, and conversion attribution.

| Metric | How It's Tracked |
|--------|------------------|
| **Traffic Sources** | Referrer domain & type from `user.sessions` |
| **UTM Parameters** | Extracted from `url.full` on navigation events — `utm_source`, `utm_medium`, `utm_campaign` |
| **Campaign ID** | Extracted from `campaign_id=` or `utm_campaign=` URL parameter |
| **Conversions** | Sessions reaching `/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/` |
| **Attribution** | `lookup` join correlates UTM sessions → booking confirmations |

> **Field Notes:** UTM extraction uses `url.full` from `navigation` events. Referrer uses `referrer.url.domain` from `user.sessions`. If tiles show empty data, verify these fields exist in your environment using an exploratory query. Campaign IDs are extracted from the `campaign_id=` URL parameter — adjust the parameter name if your URLs use a different convention.

2.title: 🏷️ UTM-Tagged Sessions
2.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| summarize utm_sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

3.title: 📊 Unique Campaigns
3.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_campaign")
| fieldsAdd utm_campaign = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_campaign=")[1], "&")[0]
| summarize campaigns = countDistinct(utm_campaign)

4.title: ✅ UTM Conversions
4.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
| sort timestamp asc
| summarize utm_source = takeFirst(utm_source), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | fieldsAdd converted = 1
    | summarize converted = max(converted), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"conv."
| summarize conversions = countIf(isNotNull(conv.converted))

5.title: 📈 UTM Conversion Rate %
5.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
| sort timestamp asc
| summarize utm_source = takeFirst(utm_source), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | fieldsAdd converted = 1
    | summarize converted = max(converted), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"conv."
| summarize total = count(), conversions = countIf(isNotNull(conv.converted))
| fieldsAdd conversion_rate = round(toDouble(conversions) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 2)

6.title: 🌐 Top Referrer Domains (External Traffic Sources)
6.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| filter isNotNull(page.source.url.domain) and page.source.url.domain != ""
| filter page.source.url.domain != url.domain
| filter page.source.url.domain != "www.example.com" and page.source.url.domain != "example.com" and page.source.url.domain != "tickets.example.com"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{page.source.url.domain}
| sort sessions desc
| limit 15
| fieldsAdd timeframe = now()

7.title: 📈 Daily UTM-Tagged Sessions
7.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| fieldsAdd has_utm = if(contains(url_str, "utm_source"), 1.0, else: 0.0), no_utm = if(not contains(url_str, "utm_source"), 1.0, else: 0.0)
| makeTimeseries utm_sessions = sum(has_utm), organic_sessions = sum(no_utm), interval:1d

9.title: 📊 Sessions by UTM Source
9.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{utm_source}
| sort sessions desc
| limit 15
| fieldsAdd timeframe = now()

10.title: 📊 Sessions by UTM Medium
10.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_medium")
| fieldsAdd utm_medium = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_medium=")[1], "&")[0]
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{utm_medium}
| sort sessions desc

11.title: 📋 Full UTM Campaign Breakdown (Source × Medium × Campaign × Campaign ID)
11.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
| fieldsAdd utm_medium = if(contains(url_str, "utm_medium"), splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_medium=")[1], "&")[0], else: "(not set)")
| fieldsAdd utm_campaign = if(contains(url_str, "utm_campaign"), splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_campaign=")[1], "&")[0], else: "(not set)")
| fieldsAdd campaign_id = if(contains(url_str, "campaign_id"), splitString(splitString(url_str, "campaign_id=")[1], "&")[0], else: if(contains(url_str, "campaignid"), splitString(splitString(url_str, "campaignid=")[1], "&")[0], else: "(not set)"))
| sort timestamp asc
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), navigations = count(), by:{utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, campaign_id}
| sort sessions desc
| limit 30

13.title: 💰 Conversion Rate by UTM Source
13.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
| sort timestamp asc
| summarize utm_source = takeFirst(utm_source), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | fieldsAdd converted = 1
    | summarize converted = max(converted), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"conv."
| summarize total_sessions = count(), conversions = countIf(isNotNull(conv.converted)), by:{utm_source}
| fieldsAdd conversion_rate_pct = round(toDouble(conversions) / toDouble(total_sessions) * 100, decimals: 2)
| sort total_sessions desc
| limit 15

14.title: 💰 Conversion Rate by Campaign
14.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_campaign")
| fieldsAdd utm_campaign = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_campaign=")[1], "&")[0]
| fieldsAdd campaign_id = if(contains(url_str, "campaign_id"), splitString(splitString(url_str, "campaign_id=")[1], "&")[0], else: if(contains(url_str, "campaignid"), splitString(splitString(url_str, "campaignid=")[1], "&")[0], else: "(not set)"))
| sort timestamp asc
| summarize utm_campaign = takeFirst(utm_campaign), campaign_id = takeFirst(campaign_id), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | fieldsAdd converted = 1
    | summarize converted = max(converted), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"conv."
| summarize total_sessions = count(), conversions = countIf(isNotNull(conv.converted)), by:{utm_campaign, campaign_id}
| fieldsAdd conversion_rate_pct = round(toDouble(conversions) / toDouble(total_sessions) * 100, decimals: 2)
| sort total_sessions desc
| limit 20

15.title: 📈 Daily UTM Conversions by Source
15.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
    | fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
    | filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
    | fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
    | summarize utm_source = takeFirst(utm_source), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"utm."
| fieldsAdd source = coalesce(utm.utm_source, "(direct / organic)")
| makeTimeseries conversions = count(), by:{source}, interval:1d

16.title: 🌍 Conversion Rate by Referrer Domain
16.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your-location/" or page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
| fieldsAdd is_homepage = if(page.url.path == "/your-location/", dt.rum.session.id, else: null)
| fieldsAdd is_confirmation = if(page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/", dt.rum.session.id, else: null)
| summarize homepage_sessions = countDistinct(is_homepage), confirmation_sessions = countDistinct(is_confirmation), by:{page.url.domain}
| filter homepage_sessions > 10
| fieldsAdd conversion_pct = round(toDouble(confirmation_sessions) / toDouble(homepage_sessions) * 100, decimals: 2)
| sort homepage_sessions desc
| limit 10

17.title: 🚪 Top Landing Pages from UTM Traffic
17.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
| fieldsAdd landing_path = toString(url.path)
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), top_source = takeFirst(utm_source), by:{landing_path}
| sort sessions desc
| limit 15

18.title: 📊 UTM Source × Medium — Sessions & Conversions
18.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| fieldsAdd url_str = toString(url.full)
| filter contains(url_str, "utm_source")
| fieldsAdd utm_source = splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_source=")[1], "&")[0]
| fieldsAdd utm_medium = if(contains(url_str, "utm_medium"), splitString(splitString(url_str, "utm_medium=")[1], "&")[0], else: "(not set)")
| sort timestamp asc
| summarize utm_source = takeFirst(utm_source), utm_medium = takeFirst(utm_medium), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | fieldsAdd converted = 1
    | summarize converted = max(converted), by:{dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"conv."
| summarize sessions = count(), conversions = countIf(isNotNull(conv.converted)), by:{utm_source, utm_medium}
| fieldsAdd conversion_rate_pct = round(toDouble(conversions) / toDouble(sessions) * 100, decimals: 2)
| sort sessions desc
| limit 20
